productDisplayName: Converse Men's AS Canvas HI Black Shoe
description: These uber cool shoes from converse come in a stylish high ankle design with black canvas uppers and an All Star heel patch for durability. The white canvas lining and cushioned footbed offer hours of uninterrupted comfort, while the white lace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug Fit. Composition Black high ankle men's lace-up shoes with canvas upper, rubber outsole, white laces, stitch detailing and All Star heel patchShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
